sourceName: User-pasted Big Star Wicker Park menu

sections.name: Daily specials
items: Monday - Big Star Smash Burger: double beef patty, crispy chihuahua cheese, special sauce, lettuce, onion, tomato
Taco Tuesday - Pastor, Pollo, Panza, Papas tacos; choose Carne Asada, Pescado, or Camerones for an upcharge
Thursday - Carnitas Tacos

sections.name: Starters
items: Big Star Nachos - melty cheese sauce, crispy tortilla chips, pico de gallo, pickled jalapeños, black beans, salsa seca, guacamole, cilantro
Chips & Salsa - chipotle salsa and salsa verde
Queso Fundido - melted queso chihuahua, rajas poblano, housemade chorizo, fresh tortillas
Handmade Guacamole - fresh avocado, serrano chili, red onion, garlic, cilantro, lime
Big Star Salad - romaine, radish, black beans, cucumber, red onion, avocado, pepitas, mint, queso fresco, chile-ranch dressing

sections.name: Tacos
items: Al Pastor - marinated pork shoulder, grilled pineapple, grilled onion, cilantro
Pollo - grilled chicken, poblano, poblano salsa, queso fresco, pickled red onion, cilantro
Carne Asada - marinated skirt steak, banana pepper, salsa mocajete, guacamole, white onion, cilantro
Pescado - beer-battered tilapia fillet, chipotle mayo, cabbage, red onion, cilantro
Camarones Fritos - crispy shrimp, serrano crema, corn pico de gallo, cilantro
Panza - braised pork belly, salsa arriera, chicharrones, crema, cilantro
Papas Con Rajas - potato, rajas chipotle, queso cotija, onion, cilantro
The Walking Taco - fritos chips, pinto bean dip, crema, cholula hot sauce, queso chihuahua, onion, cilantro
Sprout Tostada - crispy brussels sprouts, refried beans, pipian verde, pickled guajillo chilis, cilantro
Quesabirria - beef birria, chihuahua cheese, onion, cilantro, consommé

sections.name: Burritos and sweets
items: Carne Asada Burrito - skirt steak, charred corn elotes, poblano rajas, salsa, lettuce, chipotle mayo, queso chihuahua
Pollo Burrito - braised chicken, rice, charros beans, crema, poblano rajas, lettuce, and salsa seca
Bean Burrito - refried beans, chihuahua cheese, onions, cilantro, cholula hot sauce

Crunch Star Supreme - chihuahua cheese, crunchy tostadas, lettuce, crema, salsa seca, pico de gallo in a flour tortilla with choice of beef birria, braised chicken, al pastor, papas con rajas or black beans
Kids Quesadilla - flour tortilla, chihuahua cheese, chips
Kids Nachos - crispy chips, cheese sauce, black beans, pico de gallo
Kids Burrito - flour tortilla, chihuahua cheese, rice, black beans, chips
Elotes
Rice & Beans
Vegetables Escabeche
Hot Fudge Skillet Brownie - warm chocolate brownie, caramelized cinnamon ice cream

sections.name: Brunch
items: Breakfast Burrito - scrambled eggs, hashbrown, frijole charros, salsa seca, crema, avocado, green onions, griddled in a flour tortilla
Churro French Toast - thick cut brioche, churro butter, maple syrup
Brunch Papas - crispy potatoes, cotija cheese, chipotle mayo, cilantro
Chorizo Con Papas Taco - chorizo verde, scrambled eggs, fried potatoes, salsa verde, white onion
Chilaquiles Taco - tortilla chips, guajillo salsa, scrambled eggs, avocado, pickled red onion
Carne Asada Taco - marinated skirt steak, banana peppers, scrambled eggs, salsa molcajete, avocado

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Wicker Park menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu included a warning that menu items can contain unlisted ingredients and asked diners to inform servers of allergy or dietary restrictions.
No explicit peanuts or tree nuts were called out in the pasted sections.
